caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned in front of a plain black background. She wears a light green tunic featuring a small floral pattern and a dark beaded necklace. In the initial scene, she looks forward with a neutral expression. As time progresses, she begins speaking, opening her mouth and gesturing with her right hand raised toward her chest. Following this, she momentarily closes her eyes and tilts her head slightly. Finally, she opens her eyes and continues speaking, looking directly ahead. A small circular gold logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of each scene. The woman remains centered in the frame throughout the sequence, with the only changes being her facial expressions and hand movements.
